chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. STRA 76 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For orders as to non-prosecution of reference application as office objection No.6 & 19 not complied with since 27.1.2018 29.01.2026 Ms. Summiya Kalwar advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of applicant which is taken on record. This matter is pending since 2018 without any progress; even notice has not been sought till date. Matter remains listed for orders as to non- prosecution and on numerous dates including 27.01.2018, 08.10.2018, 28.01.2020 and 25.03.2022 time was granted. Matter remains in default and even today more time is being sought. No case is made out to perpetuate this matter pending without any progress for 8 years. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 63 of the Sindh Sales Tax on Services Act, 2011. Judge Judge Amjad
